title: AAEP Event: agent.session.started
description: Announces the beginning of an agent session. This is the first event of every session and the anchor for the session's session_id. Defined normatively in Chapter 4 §4.1.1 of the AAEP specification.

summary_normal.description: Human-readable description of what the session will do at normal verbosity. Suitable for direct announcement to the user. Required on every agent.session.started event.

summary_terse.description: Shorter form of summary_normal for terse verbosity. Typically a few words.

summary_detailed.description: Longer form of summary_normal for detailed verbosity. Includes context, expected steps, and rationale where useful.

expected_duration_ms.description: Producer's estimate of total session duration in milliseconds. Subscribers MAY use this to set up progress UI or advise the user of expected wait time.

requested_by.description: Identifier of the user, system, or process that initiated the session. Format is producer-defined; common patterns are 'user:<id>', 'system:<service>', or 'agent:<agent_id>'.

request_text.description: The original natural-language request from the user, if available and not sensitive. Producers MUST NOT include secrets or excessive PII in this field.

tools_available.description: List of tool names the agent has access to in this session. Aids subscribers in setting expectations about possible actions.

examples.summary_normal: Retirement Planning Assistant is processing your request.
Retirement Planning Assistant is processing your request.
examples.summary_detailed: Retirement Planning Assistant is processing your request to plan retirement savings strategy. Estimated 30 seconds. The assistant will read your financial profile, calculate projections, and draft a recommendation.
